series_metadata.series_description: Includes assorted reports such as reports generated pertaining to assessments, refunds, amended tax returns, payment reversals, credits, bankruptcy, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value to agency, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 mos., after scanning, then shred. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value to agency, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
